orgs.name: StartupZoo
orgs.description: Nonprofit community for Kalamazoo founders that hosts pitch nights, workshops, and networking for entrepreneurs.

orgs.name: Starting Gate
orgs.description: WMU student business accelerator that runs across fall and spring semesters and ends with a public demo day.

orgs.name: Cultivate269
orgs.description: $100K pitch competition for WMU students run by Kalamazoo Forward Ventures to fund underinvested founders.

orgs.name: Tsunami Lab
orgs.description: Startup lab by Kalamazoo Forward Ventures that helps founders validate ideas and get investment ready.

orgs.name: RIDI Venture Studio
orgs.description: Richmond Institute for Design and Innovation studio where students turn product ideas into market-ready ventures.

orgs.name: SBDC at WMU
orgs.description: Michigan Small Business Development Center office at WMU that offers free consulting, training, and market research.

orgs.name: Developer Club WMU
orgs.description: Student developer community at WMU that builds software projects and helps members grow real-world coding skills.

orgs.name: Data Science & AI Club WMU
orgs.description: Student-run club that teaches data science and AI concepts through talks, workshops, and applied projects.

orgs.name: Business Tech Network WMU
orgs.description: WMU group for students interested in the intersection of business, technology, and innovation careers.

orgs.name: TechNext WMU
orgs.description: Tech and innovation club at WMU that showcases emerging technologies and connects students with industry.

orgs.name: WMed Innovation Center
orgs.description: Located on the WMU Parkview Campus and supports startups with labs, offices, and business support services.

orgs.name: Kalamazoo Startup Center
orgs.description: Small business service that specializes in bookkeeping, financial literacy, and monthly reporting, starting with a free consultation.

orgs.name: Liminal Group Ventures
orgs.description: Venture studio and entrepreneurial hub that helps aspiring founders and early-stage startups become investment ready.

orgs.name: Kalamazoo Entrepreneur Network (KZEN)
orgs.description: County-wide entrepreneur network focused on inclusive support and resource navigation for BIPOC and local founders.

orgs.name: LINK Kalamazoo
orgs.description: Community organization that connects Kalamazoo youth and young adults with career, education, and entrepreneurship opportunities.

orgs.name: Tech Week GR
orgs.description: Annual Grand Rapids tech and innovation festival with talks, meetups, and community events.

orgs.name: Start Garden
orgs.description: Grand Rapids startup hub that offers coworking, pitch competitions, and founder support programs.

orgs.name: DeVos Center for Entrepreneurship & Innovation
orgs.description: GVSU entrepreneurship center that provides courses, competitions, and mentorship for student founders.

orgs.name: MWC3
orgs.description: Annual Midwest Collegiate Computing Conference in Grand Rapids with hands-on student competitions, workshops, and industry-led sessions.
